Home.heroTitle: Let your couples collect every guest’s photo — over WhatsApp
Home.heroSubtitle: You share one QR code per wedding. Guests scan it and send their photos on WhatsApp — no apps. Everything lands in a private gallery you hand to the couple.
Home.aboutCard1Para: A private QR code for your wedding or event — in seconds. No apps. No complicated setup.
Home.aboutCard2Para: One QR code. Every moment. Photos arrive via WhatsApp — instantly, from any phone.
Home.aboutCard3Para: All photos are gathered automatically into one shared gallery you can browse, download and share.
Home.dedicatedPara: Create a QR code for your event and let guests share photos instantly via WhatsApp. No apps, no accounts — just memories in one place.
Home.digitalTitle: We believe the best moments are captured by everyone.
Home.beliefsCol1Para: Guests already know how to send photos on WhatsApp. We turn that into a private, organized gallery of your event.
Home.beliefsCol2TitleB: the album QR code and send in a second.
Home.beliefsCol2Para: Create a private event gallery and a unique QR code guests can scan in an instant.
Home.faqQ1: Do guests need to install an app?
Home.faqA1: No. Guests just scan a QR code and send photos via WhatsApp. It all works instantly — no installs, no sign-up.
Home.faqQ2: How do photos show up in the gallery?
Home.faqA2: Guests send photos via WhatsApp and QRevent automatically collects them into your private event gallery in real time.
Home.faqQ3: Can I download and share the gallery?
Home.faqA3: Yes. You can browse, download and share the gallery anytime. All of your guests' photos in one place — perfect after the event.
Home.contactSubtitle: Questions about using QRevent for a wedding or event? We're happy to help.
Home.contactNote: We're available by email and WhatsApp.

Portal.title: QRevent Portal
Portal.accessNotEnabled: Your portal access is not enabled yet.
Portal.accountInactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact support.
Portal.noAlbums: No albums yet. Go to {create} in the menu.
Portal.oldPinInvalid: The old PIN no longer works
Portal.resetPinConfirm: Reset the owner PIN? The old PIN will stop working.
Portal.deleteConfirm:
Delete this album? The photos will be deleted too.

This is only allowed within 24 hours of creating the album.
Portal.createSubtitle: One client = one QR code. Guests send photos via WhatsApp.
Portal.dateHelper: If you set a date, the upload window will be centered around it.
Portal.langHelper: Language the WhatsApp bot replies in. Auto picks Croatian, German or English per guest, based on their phone number.
Portal.next1: Share the QR code with guests → WhatsApp opens with the album code already filled in.
Portal.next2: Guests send photos → they appear in the public gallery instantly.
Portal.next3: The couple (owners) can delete or download photos using the manage link and PIN.
Portal.albumCreatedDesc: Share the QR code with guests. Give the PIN to the couple (owners) to manage the gallery.
Portal.noAccessNote: Portal access is not enabled yet. Contact support and we'll activate your account.
Portal.inactiveNote: Your account is inactive. Please contact support.
Portal.supportText: Need help, an account, or account activation? Contact support.

Gallery.downloadDeleteWarning: Heads up: your photos will be permanently deleted 24 hours after this download. Make sure you save the ZIP file. Continue?
Gallery.purgeScheduled: Downloaded ✓ — your photos will be permanently deleted in 24 hours.
Gallery.deletePhotoConfirm: Delete this photo? This cannot be undone.
Gallery.ownerPinHelp: Enter the PIN you got from the photographer to delete or download photos.
Gallery.managePinHelp: This PIN was assigned to you to manage the gallery (delete photos + download all).

Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: We'll send you a magic link to access the portal.
Login.checkEmailBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.
Login.requestNewLinkIn: You can request a new link in {seconds}s.
Login.notReceived: Didn't get it? Check your spam / junk folder.
Login.terms: By continuing you accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Login.errRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait 1 minute and try again.
Login.errNetwork: Network issue detected. Please check your connection and try again.
Login.errCooldown: Please wait a moment before requesting another link.

Seo.homeTitle: Collect every guest’s wedding photo over WhatsApp
Seo.homeDescription: QRevent lets photographers offer couples guest-photo collection via WhatsApp — one QR code, no apps. Every photo lands in a private gallery you can download and share.
Seo.demoTitle: Live demo — collect event photos with a QR code
Seo.demoDescription: See it live: guests scan a QR, send photos on WhatsApp, and watch them appear in a shared gallery. No app, no signup — try it now.
Seo.registerDescription: Offer your couples WhatsApp guest-photo collection. Request your QRevent photographer account and start in minutes.
Seo.pricingDescription: Simple per-event pricing for QRevent. One QR code per wedding or event, in yearly bundles from €60. No monthly fees.

Pricing.title: Simple, per-event pricing
Pricing.subtitle: One QR code = one wedding or event. Pick a yearly bundle that fits how much you shoot — no monthly fees.
Pricing.starterDesc: For solo photographers with a handful of events.
Pricing.proDesc: For busy photographers and small studios.
Pricing.studioDesc: For studios and event managers running many events.
features: English, Croatian & German — interface and bot
Pricing.note: Need more codes or a custom plan for an agency?

Register.title: Request access
Register.subtitle: Tell us a bit about you and we'll set up your photographer account.
Register.successBody: Thanks! We'll review it and email you at {email} once your account is ready.
Register.errInvalid: Please enter your name and a valid email.
Register.errFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Demo.subtitle: You create one QR code per wedding. Guests scan it and send their photos and videos straight from WhatsApp — no app, no logins. Everything lands in a private gallery you hand to the couple.
Demo.howTitle: How you create an album — in under a minute
Demo.step1Desc: Log in, enter the couple's names and the date. One album = one QR code.
Demo.step2Desc: Print it on a table card or send the link. Guests scan it and WhatsApp opens — pre-filled.
Demo.step3Desc: Photos appear instantly. The couple unlocks delete + download-all with a private PIN.
Demo.tryStep1: Scan the QR (or tap the button on your phone).
Demo.tryStep2: Send any photo or short video on WhatsApp.
Demo.tryStep3: Watch it appear in the gallery below within seconds.
Demo.demoNote: This is a shared, always-open demo album. Your photo will show up below.
Demo.fullGallery: Open the full gallery your couples get ▸
Demo.convertTitle: Ready to offer this to your couples?
Demo.convertDesc: Request access and we'll set up your account so you can generate your first wedding QR.
